stemHtml: A message or data downlink means…

options.a: a transmission of signals from an aircraft in flight to a station on the Earth
options.b: uploading ATIS / weather / maintenance data to an airborne unit
options.c: downloading and printing the ATC clearance from the Controller Pilot Data Link Communication (CPDLC)
options.d: downloading ATIS / weather / maintenance data from a ground control unit via the onboard Internet connection
